title: urochloa humidicola
intro: Urochloa humidicola, also known as Panicum humidicola, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Africa and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating pain. In herbal preparations, Urochloa humidicola is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
